infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Voice input lets you answer open interview questions by speaking.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The microphone is used only when you choose voice input for an answer.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MagicMirror to use the microphone for spoken answers.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow MagicMirror to turn spoken answers into text.
